narrative:
Carey Ex Vill Sd (Wyandot) exempted village school district has 3,384 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.4 percentage points.
